meta.description: Employment Tribunal decisions tagged with Equality Act 2010 jurisdiction codes. Metadata only — outcomes and awards not available without PDF parsing.
meta.fields_note: Fields available from metadata: case_ref, case_name, claimant, respondent, decision_date, publication_date, jurisdiction_codes, country, tribunal_level, pdf_url, page_url, scraped_at. Fields NOT available without PDF parsing: outcome, award, judge, tribunal_office, hearing_date.
